title: Backend Developer Vacancy at CDAC Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at CDAC Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
CDAC Consulting Pvt Ltd, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Surat operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About CDAC Consulting Pvt Ltd:
CDAC Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CDAC Consulting Pvt Ltd!
